Alice Chen: Bob has been leading the intake redesign with Engineering over the last six weeks.

Interviewer: What is the CEO asking the team to prioritize before the next steering committee?

Bob Martinez: The CEO wants Engineering to standardize the workflow in ServiceNow before Q3, even though the intern is still shadowing the rollout and documenting gaps.

Interviewer: Where is the team seeing the biggest friction today?

Alice Chen: Engineering is aligned on the target state, but ServiceNow still needs a cleaner intake taxonomy and the intern needs more coaching on escalation paths.
